$description: ROOTA brand design tokens (W3C DTCG format). Source of truth: ROOTA landing page (roota.ktgs.llc). Share with the SaaS app to keep brand colors consistent.

green.$description: Primary brand color. CTAs, accents, links, highlights. The single most important color to match.

green-strong.$description: Darker green for icon strokes / green text on light tinted backgrounds (better contrast).

green-500.$description: Lighter green. Also used at 8% opacity for faint green section bands.

green-tint.$description: Pale green fill for icon tiles.

navy.$description: Canonical brand navy. Headings and primary dark text. Pairs with brand green (logo = green + navy).

navy-tint.$description: Neutral pale navy for chips / tags.

alt.$description: Alternating section background (light blue-gray). Use ONE alt background for the whole app.

green-band.$description: Faint green section band. Flattened equivalent of green-500 at 8% opacity over white. On the LP it is authored as rgba(52,172,117,0.08).

base.$description: Orange. RESTRICTED: use only for the 'coming soon / 開発予定' badge. Do not use elsewhere.

text.$description: Text color on the warning badge.

japanese.$description: Japanese text (falls through from the Latin stack).
